top_signals.title: Saronic picks Texas port for $3B shipyard, betting on defense manufacturing boom
top_signals.summary:
Austin-based Saronic has selected the Port of Brownsville, Texas, for its flagship $3 billion autonomous shipyard project.

The post Saronic picks Texas port for $3B shipyard, betting on defense manufacturing boom appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: UNI burn poised to grow as Uniswap governance votes on v4 fees and Robinhood Chain expansion
top_signals.summary: Both proposals route new fees into the UNI burn system created under December's "UNIfication" overhaul, with voting open from July 19 through July 26.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
